title: Birding 101 Workshop
description: An introductory birding workshop for beginners. Session covers the basics of birdwatching, binocular handling, and identifying local bird species. Bookings are closed.

title: Turahalli Tree Park Bird Walk
description: Our most recent nature walk. Highlights included spotting the Puff-throated Babbler and Blue-faced Malkoha.

title: Jyotipura Reserve Forest Walk
description: A nature walk through the Jyotipura Reserve Forest.

title: Hesarghatta Bamboo Forest Walk
location: Hesarghatta Bamboo Forest and ICAR area
description: Birding around the Hesarghatta Bamboo Forest and ICAR area.
